title: Titans
description: This mod is made for those who love adventures. Adds new ore, materials, items, structures, and a boss
body:
Explore the world, find lost structures and new ores, craft new armor and weapons from them to defeat bosses!
A more detailed description with spoilers:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Deep in the earth, you will find egoriks ore, which is stronger than diamond. From it, you can craft weapons and armor. Also, by finding a lost ship, you will discover resources that will help you defeat the water boss dwelling near the ship. The Lost House and the Lost Mine will help you locate this ship. By defeating the boss, you will be able to craft a material surpassing netherite - maxis. The new smithing template is deep inside the mountain, which can be found using a map bought from a villager. It is needed to craft Maxis armor more cheaply.

</details>



![lost house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f194ad5fac5c339b6b68dceb41661b197a9075e.png)


![lost ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a280719fe553683b6ebc62e1d616dd74ecb0ecae.png)

How to find boss:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You can find the ship using maps sold by villagers: the fisherman and the cartographer, or find maps in the Lost House or in Lost Mine. For the water boss to appear, you must sail to the ship at night during rain.

</details>
